description: Seed data for service catalogue and prompt templates (four services: AI automation, Market research, Compliance, Document packs).

services.description: AI-powered workflow blueprint and process design report.
Business process mapping and optimisation report.
AI tool recommendation and fit report.
HMO licensing and compliance audit report.
Essential document pack (rent arrears, deposit, reference, receipt, GDPR).
Tenancy document pack (AST, renewal, notice to quit, guarantor, rent increase).
Pro document pack (inventory, deposit info, access notice, landlord notice).

prompts.name: AI Workflow Blueprint Report
